title: From Vajrayana Tara to Bengali Baul: A Computational Study of Lexical Transmission Across Buddhist, Shakta, and Vaishnava Traditions in Bengal
abstract: arXiv:2606.26803v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We present a computational corpus study of vocabulary relationships across eight tradition layers of Bengali and Sanskrit devotional literature spanning the 8th to 19th centuries, encompassing Buddhist Vajrayana, Shakta Tantra, Vaishnava, and Baul traditions. Using a corpus of 75 texts and TF-IDF character n-gram vectorization with cosine similarity analysis, we address the historically argued but previously unquantified claim that Buddhist Vajrayana vocabulary survived the collapse of the Pala monasteries and was absorbed into the Shakta Tantra tradition of Bengal. The central finding is a specificity result: the Gitagovinda (Vaishnava Sanskrit, 12th century) has zero cosine similarity to Shakta Kali texts, while Bridge Tara texts (Buddhist-Shakta transitional, same century, same language) have cosine similarity 0.54 to Shakta Kali. This 8.5-fold contrast between two Sanskrit traditions from the same century demonstrates that the Buddhi

Title: From Vajrayana Tara to Bengali Baul: A Computational Study of Lexical Transmission Across Buddhist, Shakta, and Vaishnava Traditions in Bengal

translated_title: 从金刚乘度母到孟加拉鲍尔：对佛教、性力派与毗湿奴派传统在孟加拉地区词汇传承的计算研究
translated_abstract: 我们提出了一项计算语料库研究，考察了8至19世纪孟加拉语和梵语宗教文学的八个传统层中的词汇关系，涵盖佛教金刚乘、性力派坦陀罗、毗湿奴派和鲍尔传统。通过使用包含75篇文本的语料库、TF-IDF字符n-gram向量化及余弦相似度分析，我们验证了一个历史上被讨论但此前未被量化的观点：佛教金刚乘词汇在帕拉寺院崩溃后幸存，并被吸收进孟加拉性力派坦陀罗传统。核心发现是一项特异性结果：《吉塔哥文达》（12世纪毗湿奴派梵语文本）与性力派迦利文本的余弦相似度为零，而桥梁度母文本（同一世纪、同一语言的佛教-性力派过渡文本）与性力派迦利文本的余弦相似度为0.54。同一世纪两个梵语传统之间8.5倍的对比表明，佛教词汇的传承具有明确的特异性。
tldr: 通过计算分析，证实佛教金刚乘词汇在历史变迁中被性力派传统特异性吸收，而非泛化传播。
en_tdlr: Computational analysis confirms that Buddhist Vajrayana vocabulary was specifically absorbed by the Shakta tradition, rather than being diffusely transmitted.
